creator: ports@mark.reidel.info
text:
This fixes the build of qalculate against the latest math/cln which lacks the cln-config script so I had to work around it using pkg-config. Please submit together with the patch to math/libqalculate, without it, this patch is pretty useless.

Added file(s):
- files/patch-configure
- files/patch-src-Makefile

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
